description: Defines the issue typing contract governing classification of construction issues. All issues must be typed using the governed issue_class enumeration. Runtime must validate issue records against this contract and must not define its own issue classes.
fail_closed_rule: Any issue record with an unrecognized issue_class or severity must be rejected. Runtime must not invent issue classifications.

missing_detail.label: Missing Detail
missing_detail.description: A required construction detail is absent from the drawing set. The assembly or interface cannot be fully described without this detail.

incompatible_material.label: Incompatible Material
incompatible_material.description: Two or more materials specified in the assembly are chemically, thermally, or structurally incompatible per manufacturer or code requirements.

unresolved_interface.label: Unresolved Interface
unresolved_interface.description: An interface between two assemblies or components lacks a defined connection, seal, or transition detail.

scope_conflict.label: Scope Conflict
scope_conflict.description: Two or more disciplines or specification sections claim ownership of the same assembly, component, or interface without coordination.

parameter_gap.label: Parameter Gap
parameter_gap.description: A required parameter (dimension, slope, R-value, fire rating, etc.) is missing or under-specified in the contract documents.

missing_ownership.label: Missing Ownership
missing_ownership.description: No discipline or trade has been assigned responsibility for a required assembly, detail, or interface.

readiness_blocker.label: Readiness Blocker
readiness_blocker.description: A prerequisite condition for construction readiness has not been met, such as missing submittals, incomplete QA checks, or unresolved RFIs.
